$comment: SDD spec content schema. Validates the STRUCTURE of an SDD epic's specification body as exposed by the jit projection under `sections`. A compliant spec has three sections: `## Requirements` (each item shaped `REQ-N: <text>`), `## Scenarios` (each item a single-line `Given ... When ... Then ...`), and `## Success Criteria` (each item marked `[hard]` or `[aspirational]` and carrying a REQ id). All three sections must exist and be non-empty, every item must match its expected shape via `pattern`, and at least one Success Criteria item must be `[hard]` (the `contains`/`minContains` hard-criterion check). Section keys are the slugified headings the jit projection emits.
